name: one-system/example-laravel
description: Minimal Laravel sample demonstrating the One System CAS client package (laravel-cas-client-package).

repositories.//: Depend on the LOCAL package via a composer 'path' repository (no publishing).
repositories.//2: This path resolves through the symlink at one-system/packages/laravel-cas-client-package.
repositories.//3: The package directory is referenced read-only; we never modify it.
